LABEL: 
Diagnosis Code (1–12) 
DESCRIPTION: The diagnosis code on the claim. There are up to 12 diagnosis codes on the IP header claim, up to five 
(5) for LT, and up to two (2) for OT. The lower the number, the more important the diagnosis in the
